title: Newsletter Subscription Prompt
overview: A call‑to‑action inviting visitors to subscribe to updates via email.
detailed_summary: At the bottom of the page, there is a section titled “Subscribe to our updates” with a “SIGN UP” button, encouraging readers to join the mailing list for news, tools, and resources related to digital project management.
content:
Subscribe to our updates.
SIGN UP
search_queries: how to subscribe to updates on the site
common_questions: Where can I sign up for updates?
What does the SIGN UP button do?
